title: WebSocket Client Messages
description: Schema for messages sent from client to server over WebSocket

OrderMessage.title: Order Message
OrderMessage.description: Request to place a new order

side.description: Order side: 'bid' for buy, 'ask' for sell

price.description: Limit price for the order (must be positive)

order_type.description: Order type (currently only limit orders supported)

CancelMessage.title: Cancel Message
CancelMessage.description: Request to cancel a specific order

order_id.description: Unique identifier of the order to cancel

ModifyMessage.title: Modify Message
ModifyMessage.description: Request to modify an existing order's price and/or size

order_id.description: Unique identifier of the order to modify

new_price.description: New limit price (null to keep existing price)

new_size.description: New order quantity (null to keep existing size)

CancelAllMessage.title: Cancel All Message
CancelAllMessage.description: Request to cancel all orders for a specific asset or across all assets

asset.description: Ticker symbol to cancel all orders for (null to cancel all orders across all assets)
